verification_policy: Human verification recommended for any low/very-low-resource output before client delivery.

recommended_resources.name: MAFAND-MT (lafand-mt)
recommended_resources.offline: News-domain parallel sentences for fine-tuning / evaluation; not a runtime model.
recommended_resources.notes: Human-translated benchmark; repo includes MT5/mBART/M2M-100 fine-tuning recipes.

recommended_resources.name: FFR Dataset (Fon-French)
recommended_resources.offline: 117,029 Fon-French parallel sentences for fine-tuning / evaluation.
recommended_resources.notes: Largest dedicated Fon-French corpus; complements MAFAND-MT.

recommended_resources.name: NLLB-200 (distilled 600M)
recommended_resources.offline: Convert to CTranslate2 / quantize (int8) for low-RAM phones.

recommended_resources.name: MADLAD-400-3B-MT
recommended_resources.offline: GGUF 2–4-bit quantization brings the 3B model under ~1–2 GB.
recommended_resources.notes: Permissive licence (commercial OK). Prefix input with <2xx> target token.

resources.name: OkwuGbé (End-to-End Speech Recognition for Fon and Igbo)
resources.offline: Research ASR system; not a packaged mobile model.
resources.notes: Dedicated Fon speech recognition. Confirm the current code/checkpoint on the authors' page before integration; pair with FFR/MAFAND for Fon->French text.

speech_to_text.note: Not in SeamlessM4T v2, but OkwuGbé is a dedicated Fon ASR option. SeamlessM4T v2 does NOT list this language. Use the text pipeline with human transcription of voice notes, or a community ASR model verified before use.

integration_notes: Low-resource. French is the strongest pivot; human verification recommended.
